claim.observation: Volatility3 windows.info on the nfury memory image reports NTBuildLab 7601.17727.amd64fre.win7sp1_gdr., Is64Bit True, KeNumberProcessors 1, NtSystemRoot C:\Windows, NtProductType NtProductWinNt, and SystemTime 2012-04-06 21:28:39+00:00.
claim.interpretation: The acquired memory image is a single-CPU 64-bit Windows 7 SP1 (build 7601.17727) system whose in-image clock read 2012-04-06 21:28:39 UTC. This establishes the OS/build baseline and the reference time for all subsequent memory artifacts on host nfury (10.3.58.6).
